name: Salmon Stuffed Potato Skins
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons (or 3 tablespoons) sour cream per person
a few tablespoons red or black caviar per person
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the potatoes.
2. Prick each potato with a fork and rub with salt.
3. Bake in a 350°F oven until the potatoes are tender, about 1 hour.
4. Cut the potatoes in half and scoop out the flesh without breaking the skin, leaving only a thin layer of potato on the inside.
5. Chop the smoked salmon and divide between the potato halves.
6. Spoon in 2 or 3 tablespoons of sour cream into each potato half.
7. Top with red or black caviar, or some of each.
8. Serve.
